option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<resources xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" tools:locale="en"> <string name="app_name">SISPTMPartner</string> <string name="register_title">Register as Partner</string> <string name="register_subtitle">Join our network of tour guides</string> <string name="full_name">Full Name</string> <string name="email">Email</string> <string name="password">Password</string> <string name="confirm_password">Confirm Password</string> <string name="area_id">Area ID</string> <string name="invalid_email">Enter a valid email address</string> <string name="passwords_do_not_match">Passwords do not match</string> <string name="register_button">Register</string> <string name="already_have_account">Already have an account? Login</string> <string name="accept_terms">I accept the terms and conditions</string> <string name="login_title">Partner Login</string> <string name="login_button">Login</string> <string name="dont_have_account">Don\'t have an account? Register</string> <string name="welcome_home">Welcome to the Partner Home Screen!</string> <string name="logout">Logout</string> <string name="home_title">Partner Home</string> <string name="test_connection">Test Connection</string> <string name="connection_success">Connection Success: %1$s</string> <string name="connection_error">Connection Error: %1$s</string>
<!-- Home Screen --> <string name="welcome_back">Welcome back,</string> <string name="gps_permission_required">GPS Permission Required</string> <string name="gps_permission_explanation">This app requires GPS access to update your location and receive tour requests. Please enable permissions to continue.</string> <string name="grant_permissions">Grant Permissions</string> <string name="availability_status">Availability Status</string> <string name="availability_explanation">Turn on to receive tour requests</string> <string name="status_online">You are online · Visible to clients</string> <string name="status_offline">You are offline · Not visible to clients</string> <string name="tours_today">Tours today</string> <string name="your_rating">Your rating</string> <string name="incoming_requests">Incoming Requests</string> <string name="new_requests_count">%1$d new</string> <string name="no_requests_yet">You don\'t have any requests yet. Make sure you\'re online to receive new ones!</string>
<!-- Requests --> <string name="time_ago_min">%1$d min ago</string> <string name="duration_min">%1$d min</string> <string name="price_format">$%1$s COP</string> <string name="wants_tour">Wants a tour in %1$s</string> <string name="accept">Accept</string> <string name="decline">Decline</string>
<!-- Home Screen --> <string name="welcome_back">Welcome back,</string> <string name="gps_permission_required">GPS Permission Required</string> <string name="gps_permission_explanation">This app requires GPS access to update your location and receive tour requests. Please enable permissions to continue.</string> <string name="grant_permissions">Grant Permissions</string> <string name="availability_status">Availability Status</string> <string name="availability_explanation">Turn on to receive tour requests</string> <string name="status_online">You are online · Visible to clients</string> <string name="status_offline">You are offline · Not visible to clients</string> <string name="tours_today">Tours today</string> <string name="your_rating">Your rating</string> <string name="incoming_requests">Incoming Requests</string> <string name="new_requests_count">%1$d new</string> <string name="no_requests_yet">You don\'t have any requests yet. Make sure you\'re online to receive new ones!</string>
<!-- Requests --> <string name="time_ago_min">%1$d min ago</string> <string name="duration_min">%1$d min</string> <string name="price_format">$%1$s COP</string> <string name="wants_tour">Wants a tour in %1$s</string> <string name="accept">Accept</string> <string name="decline">Decline</string> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<resources xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" tools:locale="en"> <string name="app_name">SISPTMPartner</string> <string name="register_title">Register as Partner</string> <string name="register_subtitle">Join our network of tour guides</string> <string name="full_name">Full Name</string> <string name="email">Email</string> <string name="password">Password</string> <string name="confirm_password">Confirm Password</string> <string name="area_id">Area ID</string> <string name="invalid_email">Enter a valid email address</string> <string name="passwords_do_not_match">Passwords do not match</string> <string name="register_button">Register</string> <string name="already_have_account">Already have an account? Login</string> <string name="accept_terms">I accept the terms and conditions</string> <string name="login_title">Partner Login</string> <string name="login_button">Login</string> <string name="dont_have_account">Don\'t have an account? Register</string> <string name="welcome_home">Welcome to the Partner Home Screen!</string> <string name="logout">Logout</string> <string name="home_title">Partner Home</string> <string name="test_connection">Test Connection</string> <string name="connection_success">Connection Success: %1$s</string> <string name="connection_error">Connection Error: %1$s</string>
<!-- Home Screen --> <string name="welcome_back">Welcome back,</string> <string name="gps_permission_required">GPS Permission Required</string> <string name="gps_permission_explanation">This app requires GPS access to update your location and receive tour requests. Please enable permissions to continue.</string> <string name="grant_permissions">Grant Permissions</string> <string name="availability_status">Availability Status</string> <string name="availability_explanation">Turn on to receive tour requests</string> <string name="status_online">You are online · Visible to clients</string> <string name="status_offline">You are offline · Not visible to clients</string> <string name="tours_today">Tours today</string> <string name="your_rating">Your rating</string> <string name="incoming_requests">Incoming Requests</string> <string name="new_requests_count">%1$d new</string> <string name="no_requests_yet">You don\'t have any requests yet. Make sure you\'re online to receive new ones!</string>
<!-- Requests --> <string name="time_ago_min">%1$d min ago</string> <string name="duration_min">%1$d min</string> <string name="price_format">$%1$s COP</string> <string name="wants_tour">Wants a tour in %1$s</string> <string name="accept">Accept</string> <string name="decline">Decline</string> </resources>
